text:
Insight: Why agents beat workflows

Workflows break when inputs change.
Agents adapt.

A workflow says: "If X, do Y."
An agent says: "Given X, what's the best Y — and should I also do Z?"

AI HQ runs 28 agents that reason, coordinate, and self-correct.

That's the difference between automation and autonomy.
